title: Princess and dragon
text: Once there was a kind princess. She had a tiny pet dragon. The dragon was scared of mice! The princess gave him hugs. The dragon felt brave again.
tips: Picture the princess and her dragon

character_tips.anna: Fairy tale! Princess saves the dragon — fun reversal.
character_tips.maxim: Fairy tale structure. Classic narrative training.
character_tips.knopych: 🏰 FAIRY TALE! Brave princess, tiny dragon!
